query:
UPDATE outreach_campaigns 
SET 
  keywords = '["looking for AI engineer","hire AI developer","need full stack dev","looking for freelancer","need a developer","build my app","technical help needed","ai development","full stack developer","hire a programmer"]',
  subreddits = '["forhire","freelance_forhire","Entrepreneur","startups","SideProject","indiehackers","SaaS","smallbusiness"]'
WHERE id = 90001;
